title: becium mearnsii
intro: Becium mearnsii, also known as Lippia javanica, is a plant species native to eastern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and has also been found to have potential health benefits including reducing stress and improving cognitive function. Becium mearnsii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of ailments.
